channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Anthony, Magic claim 7th seed with 120-95 win over Hawks in Play-In Tournament
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (AP) — Cole Anthony came off the Magic bench with 26 points and six assists to lead the Orlando Magic to a 120-95 win over the Atlanta Hawks on Tuesday night in the first game of the Play-In Tournament.
item.dc:creator: DICK SCANLON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Dolphins pursuing trade options for All-Pro cornerback Jalen Ramsey
item.description: MIAMI GARDENS, Fla. (AP) — The Miami Dolphins are pursuing trade options for All-Pro cornerback Jalen Ramsey, general manager Chris Grier confirmed on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: ALANIS THAMES, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Warriors host Memphis Grizzlies in NBA play-in game Tuesday at Chase Center
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (BCN) -- The Golden State Warriors missed a chance to clinch a National Basketball Association playoff spot in their last regular season game on Sunday but will get another chance when they host a play-in game Tuesday against the Memphis Grizzlies at Chase Center in San Francisco.
item.dc:creator: Bay City News, KRON4

item.title: Professional soccer could be headed to the North Bay
item.description: (KRON) -- The next professional sports team in the Bay Area could be bound for the North Bay. The City of Santa Rosa announced it has entered into exclusive negotiations with the United Soccer League (USL) to explore the possibilities of bringing both a men's team and a women's team to the city.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: Blackhawks prospect Ryan Greene makes his NHL debut at Montreal
item.description: Ryan Greene made his NHL debut with the Chicago Blackhawks on Monday night, playing 13 minutes in a 4-3 shootout win at Montreal, and is expected to play in their final game of the season at Ottawa on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Paige Bueckers is No. 1 pick in WNBA draft, going to the Dallas Wings
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Paige Bueckers is ready for her next chapter after a whirlwind week that started with her helping UConn win its 12th national championship and ended with her becoming the WNBA's No. 1 draft pick by the Dallas Wings. “I’m just extremely excited to be there.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Vance fumbles Ohio State's NCAA football championship trophy as Buckeyes visit the White House
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Vice President JD Vance ended the Ohio State football team's visit to the White House on Monday by fumbling the team's national championship trophy.
item.dc:creator: WILL WEISSERT, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Warriors' playoff seeding set after loss against Clippers in regular-season finale
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- The Golden State Warriors' playoff path is set. They will play in the NBA Play-In Tournament following a home overtime loss to the Los Angeles Clippers in Sunday's regular-season finale. With the loss, the Warriors will face the Memphis Grizzlies on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: Rory McIlroy has masterful start at Augusta and closes in on career Grand Slam
item.description: AUGUSTA, Ga. (AP) — The greatest start in the 91-year history of the Masters wasn't enough for Rory McIlroy. He delivered what looked to be a haymaker late Saturday afternoon, a 6-iron so majestic and pure that he walked 10 yards before he saw it land 6 feet away for eagle on the 15th hole.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: 89th Masters Tournament
item.description: It's "Moving Day" at the 89th Masters Tournament at Augusta National Golf Club. The term refers to golfers who made the cut trying to get themselves into position on the leader board to win on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: John Hart, Fox 5

item.title: Thunder crush Jazz in home finale, 145-111
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - The Utah Jazz home finale was pretty representative of the entire season. The Jazz got blown out by the Oklahoma City Thunder.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Julian Phillips scores a career-high 23 points and Bulls rout Wizards 119-89
item.description: Julian Phillips scored a career-high 23 points on 7-of-9 shooting, Nikola Vucevic finished with 15 points, 12 rebounds and eight assists and the Chicago Bulls beat the Washington Wizards 119-89 on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: BYU lands point guard Robert Wright III from Baylor
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - It didn't take long for Kevin Young to find his new point guard. According to multiple reports, Baylor's Robert Wright III is transferring to BYU for his sophomore season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Jazz end 9-game skid with overtime win over Blazers
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - In what has been an insufferable season for Utah Jazz fans, the team gave them a treat Wednesday night -- a thrilling overtime victory.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
